description_long: This is a high-performance vehicle wheel featuring a Pirelli P Zero tire mounted on a sleek, black alloy rim. The tire has a low-profile, wide stance with a symmetrical tread pattern composed of continuous circumferential grooves and fine lateral sipes for optimal road grip. The rim showcases a five-spoke design with carbon fiber texture and subtle red accents, giving it a sporty and aggressive appearance. The central hub area is detailed with a red logo and is secured by five evenly spaced lug nuts. The outer rim edge is highlighted by a white stripe and Pirelli branding, enhancing its visual appeal. The overall construction suggests a combination of durable rubber, lightweight metal alloy, and high-performance engineering suitable for sports cars in urban environments.
description: A sporty Pirelli P Zero tire mounted on a black five-spoke alloy rim with red accents and white branding, featuring a symmetrical tread and detailed central hub.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wide, low-profile tire and symmetrical tread pattern with continuous grooves.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the inner rim structure, brake disc, and the hollow interior of the wheel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, emphasizing the tire's width and tread details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the five-spoke rim design, red central hub, Pirelli branding, and white rim accents.
attribute_spoke_pattern: Five spokes arranged radially, each with a slight twist and carbon fiber texture, evenly spaced around the hub.
attribute_rim_design: Deep-dish profile with a smooth, glossy black finish, accented by a white outer stripe and Pirelli branding; features a single-piece construction with a pronounced lip.
attribute_lug_nut_configuration: Five lug nuts, evenly spaced in a circular pattern around the central hub, exposed and easily accessible.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: Symmetrical tread with continuous circumferential grooves and fine lateral sipes, optimized for road grip and water dispersion.
